title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 April 2026
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 April 2026
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 April 2026
summary:
Main
The Indian market remains reasonably stable; however, activity is limited by a continued lack of available recycling tonnage under current conditions. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2026-04-25_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-24-april-2026_weekly-ship-recycling-report-18-apri_6351225c5f56.pdf

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian market remains reasonably stable; however, activity is limited by a
continued lack of available recycling tonnage under current conditions. Local recyclers remain interested in acquiring units within their target price levels,
though they are unable to compete with the stronger pricing offered in Bangladesh.
